claim_results.claim_text: Senior Software Engineer at Acme Corp is available
Cloud Architect at TechStart Inc is available
Staff Engineer - Platform at BigTech Ltd is available
AWS Solutions Architect Professional (Amazon Web Services) is available
Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect (Google) is available
AI Agents Reshaping Software Development is available
Rust Adoption in Cloud Infrastructure is available

opportunities.title: Senior Software Engineer at Acme Corp
opportunities.description: Build distributed systems with Python and Go. Experience with Kubernetes required.

opportunities.title: Cloud Architect at TechStart Inc
opportunities.description: Design cloud infrastructure on AWS/GCP. Lead migration projects for enterprise clients.

opportunities.title: Staff Engineer - Platform at BigTech Ltd
opportunities.description: Lead platform engineering team. Build internal developer tools and CI/CD pipelines.

opportunities.title: AWS Solutions Architect Professional (Amazon Web Services)
opportunities.description: Validate advanced technical skills in designing distributed systems on AWS.

opportunities.title: Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect (Google)
opportunities.description: Demonstrate ability to design and manage Google Cloud solutions.

opportunities.title: AI Agents Reshaping Software Development
opportunities.description: Multi-agent systems becoming mainstream in enterprise software development workflows.

opportunities.title: Rust Adoption in Cloud Infrastructure
opportunities.description: Major cloud providers adopting Rust for performance-critical infrastructure components.
